* Developing
  * [[developing/databases|databases]]
    * [[developing/databases#sql|SQL]]
      * [[developing/databases#tips & tricks|tips & trics]]
        * [[developing/databases#update part of the value|update part of the value]]
  * [[developing/django|django]]
    * [[developing/django#localization|localization]]
* Hardware
  * [[hardware/android|android]]
    * [[hardware/android#flashing|flashing]]
      * [[hardware/android#essential|Essential Phone PH-1]]
* Linux
  * [[linux/networking|networking]]
    * [[linux/networking#tcp/ip|TCP/IP]]
      * [[linux/networking#ip address aliasing]]
* Utilities
  * [[utilities/bash|bash]]
    * [[utilities/bash#configuration|configuration]]
      * [[utilities/bash#files|files]]
    * [[utilities/bash#tips & tricks|tips & tricks]]
      * [[utilities/bash#compare two dirs|compare two directories]]
  * [[utilities/brew|brew]]
    * [[utilities/brew#tips & tricks|tips & trics]]
      * [[utilities/brew#downgrade package|downgrade package]]
  * [[utilities/ffmpeg|ffmpeg]]
    * [[utilities/ffmpeg#tips & trics|tips & tricks]]
      * [[utilities/ffmpeg#conversion: batch|conversion: batch]]
      * [[utilities/ffmpeg#sample: noise|sample: noise]]
  * [[utilities/tmux|tmux]] 
    * [[utilities/tmux#panes|panes]]
  * [[utilities/vim|vim]]
    * [[utilities/vim#configuration|configuration]]
      * [[utilities/vim#lines|lines]]
